basic_details.job_title: TISS Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Executive Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with five years Finance/Administrative experience, Master's Degree in Commerce/MBA (Finance) with three years Finance/Administrative experience
qualification.details: Executive Assistant: Bachelor's Degree in Commerce and five years of Finance / Administrative work experience OR Master's Degree in Commerce/MBA with Finance specialization and three years of Finance/Administrative work experience. Preference for good Computer knowledge and experience in ERP environment. Proficiency in Word, Excel. Retired Government servants may be preferred.

selection_process: Written Test Personal Interaction Skill Test
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TISS Executive Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.tata_institute_of_social_sciences_tiss: Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with five years Finance/Administrative experience, Master's Degree in Commerce/MBA (Finance) with three years Finance/Administrative experience

content_sections.heading: TISS Executive Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TISS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TISS Executive Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TISS Executive Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Executive Assistant: Bachelor's Degree in Commerce and five years of Finance / Administrative work experience OR Master's Degree in Commerce/MBA with Finance specialization and three years of Finance/Administrative work experience. Preference for good Computer knowledge and experience in ERP environment. Proficiency in Word, Excel. Retired Government servants may be preferred.

content_sections.heading: TISS Executive Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: TISS Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date of Filling of Online Applications

content_sections.heading: TISS Executive Assistant Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Written Test Personal Interaction Skill Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Executive Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Executive Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS Executive Assistant position is 26th July 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Executive Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's Degree in Commerce with five years of relevant experience, or a Master's Degree in Commerce/MBA (Finance) with three years of experience. Good computer knowledge is also preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Executive Assistant post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government's rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for the TISS Executive Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-, SC/ST/PWD candidates pay Rs. 250/-, and women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Executive Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Executive Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Personal Interaction, and a Skill Test to assess the candidates' suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract-based position. The job type is specified as 'Contract' in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Executive Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF through the 'Important Links' section in this article. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. Can retired government servants apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, retired government servants may be preferred for the Executive Assistant position, provided they meet the other eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Executive Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Executive Assistant post announced under this recruitment drive by the Tata Institute of Social Sciences.
